info.name: MyDash
info.summary: Enhanced dashboard with grid layout and admin controls
info.description:
MyDash - Your Customizable Dashboard
MyDash provides an enhanced dashboard experience for Nextcloud with: - Grid-based widget layout with drag-and-drop positioning - Widget resizing and custom styling (colors, borders, titles) - Multiple dashboards per user - Admin-controlled dashboard templates - Conditional widget visibility (by group, time, date) - Permission levels (view-only, add-only, full customization) - Full compatibility with existing Nextcloud widgets
Administrators can create dashboard templates for user groups and mark certain widgets as compulsory.
info.author: Conduction
